name: Crock-Pot Beef Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Stew beef, trimmed to bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except frozen vegetables in the crock pot.
2. Turn on low heat and cover, cooking for 6 hours.
3. About half an hour before serving, turn up to high heat.
4. Add frozen vegetables, stir, and cover.
5. NOTES: If you are in a hurry, this can be done in 3 1/2 hours on high heat.
6. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
7. For a more robust flavor, add 1/2 cup of red wine with the vegetables.
